function.outcome_justification: The exact service line appears in three invoices, with line_eur values 520 (issued_on 2025-12-18), 260 (issued_on 2026-01-19), and 420 (issued_on 2026-03-20). Only the 2026-03-20 line falls on/after the beginning of March 2026, so total is 420.
